pageSubtitle: Privacy Policy and Terms of Service
trustedNotice: Your privacy and trust matter to us. Please read these terms carefully.

section1.title: Privacy Policy – Wijha Platform
section1.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how Wijha collects, uses, and protects your personal information when using our platform.

user.definition: Any person who registers or uses the platform.

personalData.definition: Any information that allows the user to be identified directly or indirectly.

processing.definition: Any operation performed on data (collection, storage, modification, sharing, etc.).

legalFramework.title: 2. Legal Framework
legalFramework.content: Wijha is committed to processing personal data in accordance with Algerian Law No. 18-07 on the protection of personal data, and all complementary regulations.

serviceNature.title: 3. Nature of the Service
serviceNature.intro: Wijha is a digital platform that aims to:
serviceNature.notice1: The platform provides access to resumes as an essential part of the service.
serviceNature.notice2: Fees are charged for accessing resumes or candidate profiles.
serviceNature.notice3: Any additional paid services are presented separately and clearly.

dataCollected.title: 4. Data We Collect
dataCollected.thirdPartyItem: When registering through external services (such as Google).

processingPurposes.title: 5. Processing Purposes
processingPurposes.intro: Data is processed for the following purposes:
processingPurposes.item1: Creating and managing the user account.
processingPurposes.item2: Enabling employers to access candidate profiles.
processingPurposes.item5: Ensuring platform security and preventing fraud.
processingPurposes.outro: Data is not used outside these purposes without explicit consent.

legalBasis.title: 6. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.item2: Performance of a service requested by the user.
legalBasis.item4: The platform's legitimate interest, without harming the user's rights.

userConsent.title: 7. User Consent
userConsent.item1: Collection and processing of their data.
userConsent.item2: Making their professional data available to registered employers.
userConsent.outro: The user has the right to withdraw this consent at any time.

dataSharing.title: 8. Data Sharing
dataSharing.notice2: Data is not used for advertising purposes without consent.

dataTransfer.title: 9. Data Transfer
dataTransfer.intro: In case data is transferred outside Algeria:
dataTransfer.item1: It is done in accordance with legal regulations.
dataTransfer.item2: An appropriate level of protection is guaranteed.

dataProtection.title: 10. Data Protection
dataProtection.intro: The platform applies protection measures including:
dataProtection.warning: Despite all measures taken, absolute security cannot be guaranteed in the digital environment.

retention.title: 11. Data Retention Period
retention.item1: Data is kept only for the time necessary.
retention.item2: Some data may be retained for legal or security purposes.

userRights.title: 12. User Rights
userRights.intro: The user has the right to:

accountDeletion.title: 13. Account and Data Deletion
accountDeletion.item1: Delete their account at any time.
accountDeletion.warning1: Some data may be retained if it is legally required.
accountDeletion.warning2: Some data may be retained for fraud-protection purposes.

userResponsibilities.title: 14. User Responsibilities
userResponsibilities.item2: Are responsible for the information they publish.
userResponsibilities.item3: Are responsible for sharing their data with employers.

employerResponsibilities.title: 15. Employer Responsibilities
employerResponsibilities.item1: Use data only for recruitment purposes.
employerResponsibilities.item2: Not exploit data outside the platform's scope.
employerResponsibilities.item3: Respect the confidentiality of candidate data.
employerResponsibilities.warning: The platform is not responsible for any misuse by employers outside the platform.

limitations.title: 16. Limitation of Liability
limitations.item1: Any leak resulting from unlawful use outside the platform's control.
limitations.item2: Any agreement made between the user and employer outside the platform.
limitations.item3: The accuracy of information provided by users.

cookies.title: 17. Cookies
cookies.outro: Users can disable them in their browser settings.

modifications.title: 18. Modifications
modifications.content: The platform reserves the right to modify this policy at any time. Users will be informed of important changes.

acceptance.title: 20. Acceptance
acceptance.intro: By using the platform, the user acknowledges that they:

section2.title: Privacy Policy and Data Use – Employers (Wijha Platform)
section2.intro: This policy regulates employer access to candidate data through Wijha and defines their legal and ethical obligations when using this data.
section2.agreement: By using the platform as an employer, you expressly agree to comply with this policy.

employerService.title: 1. Nature of the Service
employerService.item3: Communicate with them for recruitment purposes only.
employerService.notice1: Access to resumes is a core service of the platform.
employerService.notice2: Fees are charged to access candidate data.
employerService.notice3: This access does not grant any ownership rights over the data.

employerDataNature.title: 2. Nature of the Data
employerDataNature.outro: This data is considered legally protected personal data.

permittedPurpose.title: 3. Permitted Purpose
permittedPurpose.intro: Data may only be used for:
permittedPurpose.item3: Professional communication related to the position.
permittedPurpose.warning: Use of data for any other purpose is strictly prohibited.

prohibitedUse.title: 4. Prohibited Uses
prohibitedUse.item1: Using data for commercial or marketing purposes.
prohibitedUse.item4: Storing data outside the platform without legal justification.
prohibitedUse.item6: Sharing data with third parties without consent.

confidentiality.title: 5. Data Confidentiality
confidentiality.item2: Not disclose it to any unauthorized party.
confidentiality.item3: Take measures to protect it within their organization.

legalLiability.title: 6. Legal Liability
legalLiability.intro: The employer assumes full responsibility for:
legalLiability.item3: Any damage resulting from data misuse.
legalLiability.warning: Wijha bears no responsibility for any unlawful use by the employer.

dataRetentionEmployer.title: 7. Data Retention
dataRetentionEmployer.item1: Not retain data for longer than necessary.
dataRetentionEmployer.item2: Delete candidate data after fulfilling its purpose.

compliance.title: 8. Legal Compliance
compliance.item2: Not process data outside the legal framework.

monitoring.title: 9. Monitoring and Actions
monitoring.item2: Suspend or cancel any non-compliant employer account.

platformLimits.title: 10. Platform Limitations
platformLimits.item1: Provides only a means of communication between parties.
platformLimits.item2: Does not verify the intent of data use by employers.
platformLimits.item3: Is not responsible for any dealings outside the platform.

penalties.title: 11. Penalties
penalties.intro: In case of violation, the platform may:

modificationsEmployer.title: 12. Modifications
modificationsEmployer.content: This policy may be modified at any time. Continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of the modifications.

acceptanceEmployer.title: 13. Acceptance
acceptanceEmployer.item1: Acknowledge that you have understood this policy.
acceptanceEmployer.item3: Assume full responsibility for your use of the data.
